sections_cited: section 47 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 32 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.1 & 27. 2. For orders on CMA No.594/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 24.03.2026 Mr. Munawwar Ali Memon, advocate for the applicant. Per learned counsel, question proposed herein has already been decided against the applicant by virtue of judgment reported as 2025 SCMR 728 [Commissioner Inland Revenue Lahore v. Eagle Cables (Pvt.) Ltd.]. In view hereof, learned counsel states that reference application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
